fixes.description: T009 ARF7 single KO: tighten gm on ARF6 composite from 0.85 to 0.5 (Nagpal 2005, Reed 2018)
fixes.reason: Iter 1 gm=0.85 left ratio 0.9683, above 0.95 threshold. Reed 2018 reports nph4-1 single at 80-90% of WT, indicating ARF7 carries the majority of family activity in hypocotyl.
fixes.biological_justification: ARF7 (NPH4) dominates the differential-growth ARF family. A ~50% family-level reduction matches the 15-20% measured hypocotyl shortening after geometric-mean dilution through ARF6->Hypocotyl.

fixes.description: T010 ARF8 single KO: gm from 0.9 to 0.8
fixes.reason: Iter 1 gm=0.9 left ratio 0.9794. Not fully crossed threshold.
fixes.biological_justification: ARF8 has partial but non-zero contribution to hypocotyl elongation; gm=0.8 reflects a 20% family activity loss consistent with a secondary paralog.

fixes.description: T087 PIF1 single KO: gm on PIF3 composite from 0.9 to 0.7
fixes.reason: Iter 1 gm=0.9 left ratio 0.9794, above threshold.
fixes.biological_justification: PIF1 has a documented Rc-gated skotomorphogenic role distinct from PIF3 (Oh 2004, Shin 2009); a 30% family-level reduction reflects PIF1's non-trivial contribution when mapped onto the PIF3 composite.

fixes.description: T129 gid1b gid1c double KO: GID1 gm from 0.95 to 0.99
fixes.reason: Iter 1 gm=0.95 gave ratio 0.9089 (decreased). Push gm to 0.99 so ratio lands within the unchanged band (0.966-1.035).
fixes.biological_justification: Griffiths 2006 evidence sentence: 'Double mutant displayed essentially wild-type phenotype.' GID1A retains full function in this genotype so the effective composite perturbation is near zero.

results.reason: Algebraic +2.6% (T009/T087/T129 crossed threshold), ODE +1.8% (best K reverted to 0.5 with fewer borderlines), RWR unchanged.
